response.justification: While Bogdan demonstrates exceptional technical depth across 20 years of software development and has touched developer tools work (testing libraries, CI/CD infrastructure), he lacks the critical people management experience that is a minimum requirement for this role. The position explicitly requires 2+ years of team leadership or people management; his resume shows no evidence of managing, developing, or leading people directly. His background is that of an outstanding individual contributor and technical mentor, not a manager.
strengths: 20 years of software development experience with proven expertise across diverse tech stacks and complex problem-solving
Developer tools knowledge demonstrated through creating testing libraries (Fluent-Asserts, Trial) and CI/CD infrastructure setup at Altom Consulting
Strong mentoring and teaching orientation evidenced by organizing Refactoring Dojos, conducting workshops, and knowledge-sharing across multiple companies
concerns: No evidence of people management experience—the resume contains no direct reports, team leadership roles, or people development responsibility despite 2+ years being a minimum requirement
Developer tools experience is scattered and limited to ~2-3 years total; lacks the focused 3-year depth in compilers, build systems, or automated release infrastructure that the role requires
No evidence of leading organizational change initiatives (preferred requirement); background is deeply technical rather than strategic or organizational
